LanguageData.VEE_BombardedSurface.description: This region was subject to orbital or artillery bombardment in a past long gone, and the craters from that bombardment are still present.
LanguageData.VEE_BombardedSurface.label: bombarded surface
LanguageData.VEE_MechanoidShipChunks.description: Chunks of a crashed mechanoid ship are found around this region.
LanguageData.VEE_MechanoidShipChunks.label: mechanoid chunks
